title: bulbophyllum alcicorne
intro: Bulbophyllum alcicorne, also known as the horned bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum alcicorne include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve boiling the roots in water to create a medicinal tea, which is then used to treat these conditions.
